description: Configure Redmine to allow subtasks across all projects. A Program Manager tracks high-level milestones in the 'Corporate Strategy' project, but engineering tasks live in the 'Propulsion Systems' project. Create a cross-project hierarchy by setting the 'Next-Gen Thruster Initiative' issue (from the 'Corporate Strategy' project) as the parent task for the 'Cryogenic Fuel Pump Design' issue (in the 'Propulsion Systems' project).
